data.title: Smart Medical Devices Market to reach $180.4 billion by 2033, expanding at 12.8% CAGR from $61.7 billion in 2024.
data.description: In Austin, Texas and Tokyo on September 19, 2025, it was reported that the Smart Medical Devices Market Size reached US$61.7 billion in 2024. The market is forecasted to grow significantly, with projections indicating it will reach US$180.4 billion by 2033. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.8% from 2025 to 2033, as detailed in the most recent report by DataM Intelligence.

data.title: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. in China unveils a new Quantum Probability Theory for various domains: quantum measurement, processing, computing, decision theory. NASDAQ: HOLO.

(NASDAQ: HOLO) based in Shenzhen, China, announced on September 19, 2025, their focus on vital areas including quantum measurement theory, quantum information processing, quantum computing, and quantum decision theory (QDT).

data.title: Institutional investment bank Zenith Securities LLC acquired by Hondo Holdings LLC and Private Ledger LLC, entering a new era.
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut and New York, a significant development occurred on September 19, 2025. Zenith Securities LLC has embarked on a new chapter as Shawn Matthews’ Hondo Holdings LLC, along with Private Ledger LLC – a fully owned subsidiary of Compliers Consulting Services LLC, successfully finalized their acquisition.

data.title: Inventor from Wheatley Heights, NY develops new innovative BALLOON HOLDER for easier transportation of balloons.
data.description: A resident of Wheatley Heights, N.Y., who worked as a realtor, shared that their experience of transporting balloons in their car inspired them to create a safer and more convenient solution. Their innovation, the BALLOON HOLDER, aims to address this issue. The product's design was developed to improve the transportation of balloons, marking a significant advancement in the industry. This individual from Wheatley Heights spoke about their creative process during an event in Pittsburgh on September 19, 2025. The invention is expected to revolutionize the way balloons are handled, benefiting a wide range of users.

data.title: NEAR price could hit $4.20 in 30 days on bullish momentum, with RSI at 69.27 and MACD up. A breakout above $3.34 is key.
data.description: The NEAR Protocol is currently experiencing a positive trend as indicated by its Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 69.27 and the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) confirming an upward momentum. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of reaching a target price of $4.20 within the next 30 days if the resistance level at $3.34 is breached. This indicates a potential increase of $0.86 from the current price level.

data.title: American Century Investments achieves $300B milestone in asset growth, driven by client focus and commitment to global health.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, American Century Investments, a renowned global asset manager based in Kansas City, Missouri, marked a significant milestone by surpassing $300 billion in assets under management. The company attributed this historic achievement to its unwavering dedication to prioritizing client needs. Additionally, American Century Investments showcased its commitment to advancing global health initiatives.

data.title: Nasdaq up 100 pts; FedEx beats Q1 estimates with $22.2B revenue & $3.83 EPS, aims 4-6% YoY revenue growth in fiscal 2026.
data.description: U.S. stocks saw gains this morning, with the Nasdaq Composite rising by over 100 points. The Dow traded up by 0.18% to 46,226.49, the NASDAQ increased by 0.50% to 22,582.78, and the S&P 500 also climbed by 0.23% to 6,646.98. Consumer discretionary shares surged by 0.8%, however, energy stocks dropped by 0.9%. FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) reported better-than-expected financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2026, with revenue at $22.2 billion, surpassing estimates of $21.67 billion, and adjusted earnings at $3.83 per share, beating estimates of $3.62 per share. FedEx projects a 4% to 6% increase in revenue year-over-year for fiscal 2026. The company also affirmed plans for permanent cost reductions.

data.title: Perspire Sauna Studio expands with multiple units in 6 states. Largest sauna franchise. Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: Perspire Sauna Studio, the leading franchise in infrared sauna and red-light therapy, has announced the opening of new studios in various locations across the United States. The expansion includes new studios in Connecticut, Florida, New Jersey, New York, Southern California, and Virginia. This marks a significant development for the company as it continues to grow its presence nationwide. The announcement was made on September 19, 2025, from Costa Mesa, California, where the company is headquartered. Perspire Sauna Studio is known for its innovative approach to wellness, offering full spectrum infrared sauna and red-light therapy services.
